meanings.definition: cook and make edible by putting in a hot oven
prepare with dry heat in an oven

examples: The sun broils the valley in the summer

meanings.definition: be very hot, due to hot weather or exposure to the sun
examples: The town was broiling in the sun
the tourists were baking in the heat

meanings.definition: dried out by heat or excessive exposure to sunlight
examples: land lying baked in the heat
the earth was scorched and bare

meanings.definition: (bread and pastries) cooked by dry heat (as in an oven)
